title: Apprentice-IT
description:
About the job

What You’ll Do

If you desire to be part of something special, to be part of a winning team, to be part of a fun team - winning is fun.

In Eaton, making our work exciting, engaging, meaningful; ensuring safety, health, wellness; and being a model of inclusion & diversity are already embedded in who we are - it’s in our values, part of our vision, and our clearly defined aspirational goals.

At Eaton we are modernizing the way we use data to accelerate our digital transformation. Join our Information Technology team and help positively impact our business through leading technologies, exciting and challenging enterprise projects, and new platforms. We are transforming to a Product Centric Organization utilizing Agile practices to help us work more incrementally and fluidly, allowing us to respond more quickly to changing business needs.

EPM- Service & Support value stream.

At Eaton, we are modernizing the way we use people, processes, technology, and data to accelerate our digital transformation! We are visionary leaders playing a critical role in driving our digital transformation across the entire Eaton organization. We guide digital transformation by ensuring that technology supports business objectives – practically designing a blueprint for an organization’s technology infrastructure!

The candidate should have understanding of IT process, Application Development, DevOps/DevSecOps practices, good technical acumen and the curiosity and drive to consistently deliver results that leverage and improve upon existing standards and best practices. The candidate must be highly motivated with strong communication skills.

Making what matters work at Eaton takes the passion of every employee around the world. We create an environment where creativity, invention and discovery become reality, each and every day. It’s where bold, bright professionals like you can reach your full potential—and where you can help us reach ours.

The role offers a broad variety of responsibilities including great learning opportunities.

In This Role You Will Be Working On Following


 Frontend application Development & Support: Development and/or support of frontend and backend of the web applications.
 DevOps and Release mgmt. activities.



Responsibilities

The Apprentice Trainee is expected to work on process-related and technical activities related to frontend applications within the Service and Support value stream.

Qualifications

Graduate Degree in Comp Science / Information technology / Engineering / Equivalent.

Skills


 Strong understanding of Application development process
 Basic understanding of web applications and its frontend & backend development.
 Basic knowledge of Angular as frontend technology.
 Good knowledge of C# or Java as backend technology.
 Good knowledge of SQL/NoSQL database.
 Worked on GitHub, Jira, other DevOps tools
 Good verbal and written communication skills
 Good learning agility
 Good team player, self-motivating, and has strong drive for results.

title: Web Developer
description:
About the job

Web Developer Intern

Company: Internmo

Location: Remote

Duration: Up to 6 months

Batch Start Date: 1st July

About the Program

At Internmo, we're doing things differently. This isn't a traditional job or a standard internship—it’s an open collaboration program designed for aspiring web developers to gain hands-on, real-world experience. If you are self-taught, a boot-camp graduate, a student, or transitioning careers, this is a space for you to write actual production code, build your portfolio, and learn by doing alongside our team.

What You’ll Do

Build Interfaces: Write clean, responsive HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to craft user-friendly web pages.
Develop & Integrate: Work on interactive front-end features or integrate basic back-end APIs to bring dynamic functionality to life.
Debug & Optimize: Troubleshoot layout issues, fix bugs, and ensure websites load efficiently across different browsers and mobile devices.
Collaborate on Code: Use Git and GitHub to manage version control, push updates, and review code with the team.

Who You Are

Passionate about web development and eager to learn (no specific computer science degree required).
Solid grasp of core web technologies: HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Familiar with the basics of responsive design and mobile-first principles.
Bonus points: If you know a framework (like React, Vue, or Tailwind), have touched back-end basics (like Node.js), or have deployed a live site before.
Curious, driven, and comfortable asking questions.

What You Get

Remote & Flexible: Contribute from anywhere, on a schedule that works for you.
Real Portfolio Projects: Leave with live websites, web applications, or functional components to show future employers, stepping beyond standard tutorials.
Direct Mentorship: Get honest code reviews and guidance from our core development team.
Proof of Impact: A certificate of completion and a strong letter of recommendation for active contributors.

Application Deadline: 26th June. Fill the form and join our WhatsApp community for the joining process.

title: Front-End senior Development Intern
description:
About the job

About the Company

Webs IT Solution is dedicated to delivering innovative web solutions that empower businesses. should have 5 yearsof experience in front-end development, with a strong focus on React.js and Next.js.

title: Junior JavaScript Developer - Remote work | REF#283749
description:
About the job

At BairesDev®, we've been leading the way in technology projects for over 15 years. We deliver cutting-edge solutions to giants like Google and the most innovative startups in Silicon Valley.

Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide.

When you apply for this position, you're taking the first step in a process that goes beyond the ordinary. We aim to align your passions and skills with our vacancies, setting you on a path to exceptional career development and success.

As a Junior JavaScript Developer at BairesDev, you will work on developing and maintaining web applications using JavaScript and related technologies. You'll collaborate with experienced developers to implement features, fix bugs, and enhance web solutions while growing your skills in modern JavaScript frameworks and libraries.

What You Will Do


 Develop and maintain web applications using JavaScript and related technologies.
 Implement responsive user interfaces with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript frameworks.
 Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices.
 Collaborate with team members on code reviews and problem-solving.
 Debug issues and optimize web application performance.
 Learn and apply modern JavaScript frameworks and libraries.


What We Are Looking For


 1+ year of experience with JavaScript development.
 Good understanding of basic algorithms and data structures.
 Familiarity with HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design.
 Basic knowledge of version control systems, preferably Git.
 Ability to solve problems effectively and learn new technologies quickly.
 Good level of English.


How we do make your work (and your life) easier:


 100% remote work (from anywhere).
 Excellent compensation in USD or your local currency if preferred
 Hardware and software setup for you to work from home.
 Flexible hours: create your own schedule.
 Paid parental leaves, vacations, and national holidays.
 Innovative and multicultural work environment: collaborate and learn from the global Top 1% of talent.
 Supportive environment with mentorship, promotions, skill development, and diverse growth opportunities.


Join a global team where your unique talents can truly thrive!

title: Front End Developer Intern (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React)
description:

🗓️ Apply before 30th June to be considered for this opportunity.

title: Full Stack Web Developer Intern
description:
About the job

Full Stack Web Developer Intern (Paid)

Company: WEBBOOST SOLUTIONS BY UM

Location: Remote

Duration: 3 Months

For College Students Only!

Performance based stipend up-to 7500.00/-




This is a structured Career Launch Internship Program designed to help students gain practical project experience, mentorship, and industry exposure. The program includes guided learning resources, project evaluations, certificates, and performance-based opportunities.




Perks and benefits:

Performance based stipend up-to 7500.00/-

Certificate of Internship

Letter of Recommendation (based on performance)

Swags and goodies

Potential full-time role based on performance




Role Overview:

Work on live projects involving both front-end and back-end development. Gain hands-on experience with modern web technologies and build strong technical skills.




Key Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain responsive websites

Build dynamic web applications

Test, debug, and optimize applications

Collaborate with designers and developers




Eligibility:

Students or recent graduates in Computer Science, IT, or related fields with knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Familiarity with React, Angular, or Node.js is preferred.

title: Software Engineer Intern
description:
About the job

Founding Software Engineer Intern (Backend & System Design)




Location: Remote

Duration: 4 Months

Type: Internship

Compensation: Unpaid

PPO Opportunity: Yes




About THYNE

THYNE is building AI-powered commerce experiences, recommendation systems, personalization engines, and intelligent product discovery tools.




Role Overview

We are looking for a technically strong engineering intern interested in backend development, system architecture, databases, APIs, and scalable product development.




Responsibilities

• Design and develop backend services and APIs

• Participate in architecture and system design discussions

• Design database schemas and optimize performance

• Build scalable and maintainable backend systems

• Integrate AI and recommendation engines

• Collaborate with frontend developers and designers

• Contribute to product and technical decisions




Requirements

• Knowledge of Node.js and JavaScript/TypeScript

• Understanding of REST APIs

• Familiarity with MongoDB or PostgreSQL

• Understanding of software engineering fundamentals

• Strong problem-solving skills




Preferred Skills

• React or Next.js knowledge

• AWS or cloud deployment experience

• Docker

• AI/LLM integration experience

• System design fundamentals




Benefits

• Exposure to real-world startup architecture

• Work directly with founders

• Ownership of core systems

• Certificate of Completion

• Letter of Recommendation for outstanding performers

• PPO opportunity for top-performing interns

title: Junior Developer Intern
description:
About the job

This is a remote position.

Junior Software Developer Intern
Mode: Remote
Stipend: ₹2,000 – ₹5,000 per month





 Description:
 We are looking for a motivated and passionate Junior Developer Intern to join our team. This internship is ideal for students, freshers, or aspiring developers who are eager to gain hands-on experience in software development and work on real-world projects.


The selected candidate will work closely with the development team to build, improve, and maintain software applications while learning industry practices and contributing to product development.


 Responsibilities:
 • Collaborate with the development team to design, develop, test, and maintain software applications.
 • Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following coding standards and best practices.
 • Assist in troubleshooting, debugging, and resolving software issues to ensure smooth application performance.
 • Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving code quality and system performance.
 • Work with cross-functional teams to understand requirements and convert them into technical solutions.
 • Support API integrations and implementation of external services when required.
 • Develop and execute test cases to ensure software quality and reliability.
 • Contribute to technical documentation for applications, features, and workflows.
 • Stay updated with new technologies, tools, and development practices relevant to the product stack.
 • Collaborate with team members to meet deadlines and deliver high-quality software solutions.





 
 

Requirements






 • Basic understanding of programming concepts, data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented programming.
 • Familiarity with software development methodologies and coding practices.
 • Problem-solving and analytical thinking skills.
 • Understanding of web or software development technologies.
 • Ability to learn quickly and adapt to new technologies.
 • Good communication and teamwork skills.
 • Ability to manage tasks and meet deadlines independently.






 
 
 

Benefits






 • Mentorship and guidance from experienced developers
 • Flexible remote work environment
 • Hands-on exposure to real projects
 • Learning and growth opportunities
 • Recognition based on performance
 • Certificate and verifiable credentials
 • Access to learning courses and upskilling pathways







Desired Skills and Experience

Key Responsibilities High-Stakes Client Engagement: Identify and engage high-value prospects, leading both virtual and in-person meetings to guide them through the final stages of the sales funnel. Customized Product Demonstrations: Design and deliver tailored product demos aligned with client requirements and specific use cases, clearly translating technical capabilities into business value. Relationship & Account Management: Build and nurture strong relationships with key stakeholders through consistent communication, regular follow-ups, and strategic interactions to drive trust and long-term partnerships. Strategic Research & Sales Enablement: Conduct in-depth market, competitor, and client research to create impactful sales documents, presentations, and engagement strategies. Deal Ownership & Closure: Own the end-to-end sales cycle from initial engagement to final negotiation ensuring continuous follow-ups and momentum until deal closure. Post-Demo Engagement & Growth: Manage ongoing client interactions post-demo, ensuring business alignment, addressing concerns, and identifying opportunities for expansion. Brand Authority & Market Presence: Promote the brand through social media, webinars, and events to generate market interest and strengthen industry positioning. Eligibility A minimum of one year of professional experience specifically within SaaS, EdTech, or Corporate Placements is required. Preferred Skills Outreach & Persistence: Proven expertise in identifying high-value leads and conducting cold outreach to build professional connections from scratch, coupled with the ability to manage complex follow-up cycles to ensure consistent engagement. Event Leadership: Experience in hosting demos, webinars, or participating in industry meetups and conferences. Digital Savvy: Familiarity with high-level CRM tools and digital engagement strategies. Qualifications / Skills Required Exceptional Communication: Commanding presence with professional speaking, writing, and presentation skills. Consultative Mindset: Ability to understand client needs and provide tailored solutions. Technical Aptitude: Strong capacity to learn and explain technology or tech-driven products. Strategic Thinking: Ability to manage multiple high-priority tasks and meet professional timelines.
